Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    REST Server API
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BasicRestResource
    Identical to BasicRestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    BasicRestResourceGroup
    Identical to BasicRestServletGroup but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    BasicRestServlet
    Subclass of RestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.
    BasicRestServletGroup
    Specialized subclass of BasicRestServlet for showing "group" pages.
    JuneauRestServletContainerInitializer
    Plain Servlet-spec ServletContainerInitializer that auto-mounts RestServlet subclasses at their self-declared top-level paths in non-Spring (e.g.
    RestMixin
    Optional base class for @Rest mixin classes — the third sibling of RestServlet (servlet flavor) and RestResource (child-resource flavor), completing the servlet / resource / mixin naming triad.
    RestMixin.Builder<R extends RestMixin,SELF extends RestMixin.Builder<R,SELF>>
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestMixin subclass.
    RestMixin.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestMixin>
    Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestMixin.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case.
    RestResource
    Identical to RestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    RestResource.Builder<R extends RestResource,SELF extends RestResource.Builder<R,SELF>>
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestResource subclass.
    RestResource.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestResource>
    Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestResource.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case.
    RestServlet
    Servlet implementation of a REST resource.
    RestServlet.Builder<R extends RestServlet,SELF extends RestServlet.Builder<R,SELF>>
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestServlet subclass.
    RestServlet.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestServlet>
    Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestServlet.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case, so callers are not forced to spell the SELF type parameter.
